posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have automations on some of my boards to chnage status when a mirrored status changes. Suddenly I am no longer able to make the same changes?
I still have the current automations active, but for some reason I can no longer make or alter the ones I have.

Showing original automation that is working, however same column is now greyed out now if I try and re select

image933×418 24.2 KB

Message that pops up when I do this, keep in mind I had no problems setting this up to start with.

image1920×1032 114 KB

posts.cookedHtml:

Can you clarify how many boards this column is being mirrored across from the origin board?
